content.fact_text: Implemented production-grade security and observability middleware for order API, featuring JWT authentication, RBAC, MFA enforcement, Redis-backed session management, and correlation-based request telemetry with PII redaction.

provenance_data.behaviour: Middleware suite provides request-level observability (telemetry) and security (Auth/RBAC/MFA/Session) enforcement for order API endpoints. Uses Redis for session state and Pino for structured logging. Injects correlation IDs for distributed tracing and enforces strict PII redaction.
interfaces: createSecurityMiddleware(redis: Redis, logger: Logger): { telemetry: (req, res, next) => void, authenticate: (options?) => (req, res, next) => Promise<void> }
provenance_data.utility: Provides a centralized, reusable middleware factory for securing order API endpoints and ensuring observability consistency.
